overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a moody, overcast grassland and forest trail at dusk. The character traverses open fields and dense vegetation along a winding dirt path, passing a large dead tree and approaching a wooden fence structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered pines and prominent dead tree

events.description: character passes the large gnarled dead tree on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass toward and around a large dead tree

entered.detail: large dead tree with twisted bare branches silhouetted against the cloudy sky
tall evergreen trees dotting the landscape in the background
tall green grass and wildflowers lining both sides of the dirt path
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the grassland

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moody grassland at dusk with Geralt walking along a dirt path. A large gnarled dead tree dominates the center of the frame initially, growing larger as the character approaches and passes it on the right. Tall grass and scattered pine trees fill the landscape under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown trail through dense shrubs and thick underbrush

events.description: entering dense thicket with thick vegetation closing in on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: pushing through dense underbrush and shrubs along the narrow winding trail

entered.detail: thick bushes and shrubs crowding the left side of the path
dense vegetation and tall weeds lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow, enclosed trail surrounded by dense shrubbery and thick underbrush. The path becomes less visible as vegetation crowds in from both sides. The large dead tree and distant pines fade from view as the character moves deeper into the overgrown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with birch trees and wooden fence structure

events.description: wooden fence structure becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the vegetation opens up, revealing white birch trees and a wooden fence on the left

entered.detail: white-barked birch trees with green foliage appearing on the left side of the path
wooden fence structure and posts visible in the distance on the left
dense forest visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up into a clearer forest path with distinctive white birch trees lining the left side. A wooden fence structure becomes visible on the left as the dense shrubbery recedes. The path remains a dirt trail but becomes more defined as it stretches toward a distant forest tree line under the overcast dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody grassland that transitions into a dense thicket before opening into a structured forest path. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail under an overcast dusk sky, passing a large, gnarled dead tree that dominates the frame. As the character moves forward, the open landscape shifts into a narrow, enclosed trail where thick underbrush and dense shrubbery crowd in from both sides, obscuring the path. The scene then expands as the vegetation recedes, revealing a clearer forest trail lined with distinctive white birch trees and a wooden fence structure on the left. Finally, the camera follows the defined dirt path as it stretches toward a distant tree line under the dim evening light.
